observation: Alum day tank level fell faster than calculated demand
action_taken: Verified stroke counter and checked transfer hose
result: Found loose hose clamp and corrected it

observation: Residual turbidity increased to 1.8 NTU after rain event
action_taken: Reviewed jar test target and increased dose in 2 percent steps
result: Residual turbidity returned to 0.7 NTU after 25 minutes

action_taken: Isolated pump and recharged dampener to procedure value

observation: Valve travel time increased from 14 to 22 seconds
action_taken: Checked actuator air pressure and drained condensate bowl
Inspected suction foot valve and primed line
result: Removed gelled polymer from foot valve screen

observation: No position feedback at control room
result: Reseated terminal connector and confirmed feedback

observation: High discharge pressure alarm on alum pump
action_taken: Compared line pressure before and after injection quill
result: Flushed partially blocked injection quill and alarm cleared

observation: Day tank mixer vibration noted during refill
action_taken: Checked mixer shaft coupling and mounting bolts
result: Tightened two mounting bolts and logged follow-up inspection
